creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to webmaster from comment #0)
> The portmater run into a check for all dependencies endless loop.
> He always add the same port to the dependency check.
> 
> 
> The bug happens only with this ports:
> archivers/p5-Archive-Zip
> devel/py-py
> devel/py-pytest
> 
> I use "portmaster -at" to upgrade the ports.
> 
> example output:
[...]
Are you using FreeBSD?
If so, more information will be needed;
uname -a
svn info /usr/ports

What version of portmaster are you using?
Was it built from your ports tree, or did you use pkg to install it?

--Chris
